footer.line1: Outputs are assistive only—not airworthiness or OEM certification. You assume all risk for PID/parameter changes; verify incrementally in flight.
footer.line2: Betaflight / ArduPilot / PX4 are trademarks of their owners; always follow official documentation.

meta.title: ai_analyze_drone_log — flight log diagnostics
meta.description: Betaflight / ArduPilot / PX4: heuristics, PID drafts, and chat tuning (experimental).

home.drag_after: here, or click this area to browse
home.api_key_hint: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / DEEPSEEK_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY (any one): reports use a structured log briefing to generate plain-language guidance and SOPs, and chat is enabled.
home.hero_lead: Three common formats: Betaflight — decoded Blackbox .csv; ArduPilot — DataFlash .bin; PX4 — ULog .ulg. Drag your file into the zone below.
home.card_upload_hint: Drop a CSV here, or click to browse
home.fc_ardupilot_note: You can upload ArduPilot DataFlash .bin directly; CSV exports from a GCS also work.
home.recent_changes: Recent changes (optional, one per line: type|note)
home.err_no_file: Drop a log file (.csv / .bin / .ulg) in the dashed area, or click to browse.
home.err_bin: This file does not look like a valid ArduPilot DataFlash .bin.

chat.title: Conversational tuning
chat.subtitle: Answers must cite bundled official excerpts; without an API key you’ll see a placeholder reply.
chat.placeholder: Describe symptoms or goals in natural language…
chat.sample_message: Pitch feels sluggish—how should I tune it?

report.title: Analysis report
report.body_mix_note: Note: hypotheses, numeric metrics, and PID drafts still include offline heuristics/stats and may not match the UI language (MVP).
report.body_llm_note: The "AI guidance & SOP" section is produced by an LLM from the same run's structured briefing (Markdown + computed features). Cross-check with real-flight symptoms and official docs.
report.llm_disabled_hint: No LLM API key configured: the AI guidance block is skipped. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, or OPENAI_API_KEY to web/.env and re-upload to analyze.
report.locale_fallback_note: This report was generated in another language; English content is unavailable, showing the other language as a fallback. Re-upload to get a fully bilingual version.
report.pid_compare: Current vs draft PID (Roll / Pitch / Yaw)

api.supported_formats: Supported: .csv (e.g. Betaflight Blackbox decode), .bin (ArduPilot DataFlash), .ulg (PX4 ULog).
api.parse_ap_failed: Could not parse this .bin as an ArduPilot DataFlash log.
api.parse_ap_no_imu: Not enough IMU/GYR samples in this log for analysis.
api.parse_ulog_failed: Could not parse this file (corrupt or not a PX4 ULog).
api.parse_px4_no_gyro: No usable gyro topic found (e.g. sensor_combined, vehicle_angular_velocity, vehicle_attitude).
